caption: A screen recording captures a video call and a digital mind map application. A man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt is visible in a small video feed in the upper right corner. The central area of the screen displays a complex web of interconnected colorful icons and text labels on a black background, including labels such as "connections," "Insights," and "Knowledge Hub." Across the top, multiple browser tabs are open, with titles including "Trust & Learning by Systems..." and "Rural Community Food System." Between the first and second frames, there is no significant change. In the bottom frames, a white rectangular text box appears over the mind map, containing several columns of text including "Simple," "Specific," and "Systems Thinking." The cursor is visible, navigating the interface as the user presents the visual mapping tool during the online meeting.
